zh.title: 比特币/美元技术分析：震荡偏强延续上行结构
zh.content:
当前BTC/USD整体维持震荡上行结构，价格突破短期整理区间后逼近前高，买盘动能仍占优势，但上方存在短线获利回吐压力。

SMA20位于59742且价格明显站上均线，短期趋势偏多；MACD为正值29.66显示多头动能延续，但RSI缺失需结合量能判断强弱。

下方支撑关注59750一带及SMA20均线，若失守或回测至59500区域；上方阻力集中在60530前高，突破后有望测试61000整数关口。

交易策略上建议以回调做多为主，等待59000-59800区间分批布局，止损设在59500下方；短线冲高可逐步止盈，避免追高风险。

en.title: Bitcoin vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Bitcoin against the US dollar is maintaining a short-term bullish bias after holding gains above the 60,000 psychological zone. Price action shows a steady recovery from the recent intraday low near 59,775, with buyers defending dips effectively. The structure suggests consolidation above prior resistance turned support, indicating accumulation. Momentum remains cautiously positive, though upside follow-through depends on sustained volume and a clean breakout beyond nearby highs.

Bitcoin’s MACD reading at 29.66 confirms bullish momentum, but the absence of a signal line limits confirmation of crossover strength. The price is currently trading above the 20-day SMA at 59,742, reinforcing a constructive short-term trend. With RSI data unavailable, momentum assessment relies more heavily on moving averages and price structure. Overall, technical alignment favors buyers, though momentum could weaken without sustained upward pressure.

Key support is forming at the 20-day SMA near 59,742, closely aligned with the intraday low of 59,775, creating a strong confluence zone for buyers. Immediate resistance is observed around the recent high at 60,530, followed by a psychological barrier near 61,000. A breakout above this region could extend gains, while failure to hold support may trigger a retest of lower consolidation levels.

Short-term traders may consider buying dips toward the 59,800–59,700 support region, using tight risk controls below 59,500 to limit downside exposure. Momentum strategies favor continuation trades if price sustains above 60,530 with volume confirmation. Profit targets can be staged at 61,000 and 61,500. However, given mixed momentum signals, conservative positioning and partial profit-taking are advisable until RSI and MACD alignment strengthen further.
